basic_details.job_title: SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Clerk, Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR)
basic_details.short_information: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR) Recruitment 2026: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research has released the official notification for 13 Clerk, Assistant and More posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Odisha. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid healthcare|education|research jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Below 35 years for GDMO, 40 years for Lecturer P&O, 35 years for Demonstrator, 27 years for Typist/Clerk, Max 56 years for Consultants.
age_limit.details: General Duty Medical Officer: Maximum 35 years Lecturer Prosthetics & Orthotics: Maximum 40 years Demonstrator (Physiotherapy): Maximum 35 years Typist/Clerk (Hindi/English): Maximum 27 years Consultant Posts: Maximum 56 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Master's in Occupational Therapy, Post Graduate Degree/MBA, B.Sc. (Sp & Hg.), Graduate, Bachelor Degree in Physiotherapy, Bachelor in Audiology, Speech & Language Pathology (BASLP), Post-Graduate Degree in Prosthetics & Orthotics, Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy, 12th Class, Typing Speed.
qualification.details: General Duty Medical Officer: MBBS Degree Lecturer Prosthetics & Orthotics: Post-Graduate Degree in Prosthetics & Orthotics with at least 55% marks or its equivalent grade, Valid RCI registration. Minimum 2 years of teaching in long term courses/research experience. Demonstrator (Physiotherapy): Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy with at least 55% marks or its equivalent grade, Valid registration of the council. Minimum 3 years of experience. Typist/Clerk (Hindi / English): 12th Class or equivalent, Typing speed of 30 w.p.m. in English or 25 w.p.m. in Hindi on manual typewriter or a Typing speed of 35 w.p.m. in English or 30 w.p.m. in Hindi on Computer. Lecturer (Occupational Therapy) (Consultant): Master's in Occupational Therapy (Full time), Minimum 3 years of experience in teaching/ research in field of rehabilitation. Administrative Officer (Consultant): Post Graduate Degree/ MBA, Minimum 5 years of experience in establishment/ administrative matters. Clinical Assistant (Speech Therapist) (Consultant): B. Sc. (Sp & Hg.) equivalent, 2 years relevant experience, Registration with RCI. Assistant (Consultant): Graduate with knowledge of computer, Minimum 2 years of experience in administrative works. Physiotherapist (Consultant): Bachelor Degree in Physiotherapy, Minimum 2 years experience. Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP) (Consultant): Bachelor in Audiology, Speech & Language Pathology (BASLP), 2 years' experience, RCI registration.

salary_details.details: General Duty Medical Officer: Pay Matrix Level - 10 (Rs.56,100/- to 1,77,500/-) Lecturer Prosthetics & Orthotics: Pay Matrix Level - 10 (Rs.56,100/- to 1,77,500/-) Demonstrator (Physiotherapy): Pay Matrix Level-6 (Rs.35,400 – 1,12,400/-) Typist/Clerk (Hindi / English): Pay Matrix Level-2 (Rs.19,900/- to 63,200/-) Lecturer (Occupational Therapy) (Consultant): Rs.60,000/- per month Administrative Officer (Consultant): Rs.50,000/- per month Clinical Assistant (Speech Therapist) (Consultant): Rs.50,000/- per month Assistant (Consultant): Rs.45,000/- per month Physiotherapist (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP) (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month

selection_process: Personal Interviews Written examination (if more than 20 applications) Skill test (for technical posts)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SVNIRTAR Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SVNIRTAR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 is 11 May 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies announced for various posts under the SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026. These include both regular and consultant positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post. For some positions, a 12th Class pass is sufficient, while others require a Bachelor's degree, MBBS, or a Master's degree in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to SVNIRTAR posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post, ranging from 27 years for Typist/Clerk to a maximum of 56 years for Consultant posts. Specific age limits are detailed for each position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee differs based on the post type and category. For regular posts, it's Rs. 1000 for General/OBC and Rs. 500 for SC/ST. For consultant posts, it's Rs. 500 for General/OBC/All and Rs. 250 for SC/ST/All. PwBD candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Personal Interviews. For certain posts, a written examination or a skill test may also be conducted if a large number of applications are received.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Odisha apply for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Odisha. However, it is always best to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific state domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the posts in SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary varies significantly based on the post. It ranges from Pay Matrix Level-2 (Rs.19,900/- to 63,200/-) for entry-level positions to higher levels and fixed monthly emoluments for consultant roles, up to Rs.60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q9. How should I submit the application for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process involves applying online through the official website. Additionally, a hard copy of the online generated application along with self-attested documents must be sent via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section on this page, or by visiting the official website of SVNIRTAR. It is crucial to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
